safe_behavior: Unavailable in sanctuary and outside an authored active encounter.
risky_behavior: Server rolls the equipped weapon profile against the authoritative target and resolves bounded nonlethal harm.

cosyworld_delta: Ordinary room travel remains a movement operation.
Bounded Escape remains an operation until engagement consequences exist.

safe_behavior: Defend outside combat is unavailable unless an authored project maps it to preparation.
risky_behavior: The actor spends the encounter turn to impose the bounded dodging condition.
cosyworld_delta: Uses the bounded encounter condition rather than the complete SRD duration model.

safe_behavior: Advances only an authored active project or bond and names its recipient.
risky_behavior: Repeated unprepared assistance can apply the authored tired consequence.
cosyworld_delta: Help is a journaled project contribution, never a self-stacking generic bonus.
No profile-1 hidden-state resolver is active.

safe_behavior: Ordinary greetings remain free Chat and never create this action.
risky_behavior: A deterministic Charisma check commits one of the authored cooperation outcomes before narration.
legal_targets: nearby active resident with contextual offer
cosyworld_delta: Only bounded authored cooperation changes use Influence.

safe_behavior: Unsupported or unprepared spell content produces no offer.
risky_behavior: The kernel validates target and prepared instance, consumes one use, and moves the card to Exhausted.
legal_targets: effect-declared active actor in the same location
cosyworld_delta: Only validated prepared Item-card effects are executable.

safe_behavior: Creates one scoped setup only when an authored project can consume it.
risky_behavior: The setup has explicit duration and is consumed by the next eligible contribution.
cosyworld_delta: Prepare is a bounded one-use project setup rather than a general reaction trigger.

safe_behavior: Authored safe perceptual truths resolve without a roll and remain learn-once.
risky_behavior: Authored risky perception uses the deterministic Wisdom check path.
cosyworld_delta: Listen and Notice are labels for contextual Search, not separate mechanics.

safe_behavior: Authored safe analytical truths resolve without a roll and remain learn-once.
risky_behavior: Authored risky analysis uses the deterministic Intelligence check path.
cosyworld_delta: Study is distinct from perceptual Search and may be independently reskinned.

safe_behavior: Requires a validated usable item or authored feature contract.
risky_behavior: Authoritative uses, exhaustion, targets, clock effects, and claim keys are resolved once.
cosyworld_delta: Use and Work are contextual labels over validated Utilize bindings.
